---
title: "CB3 Economic Security and Food Maps"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: true
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
jupyter: python3
---

## Economic Security and Food Maps

This renders one saved HTML map per available Economic Security & Food metric group.

Each map follows the Health-map rule:

- demographic context = tract-color radio buttons
- Economic/Food metric = bubble overlay checkbox
- emergency food providers = optional point overlay when available

```{python}
from pathlib import Path
import html
import json
import sys

import branca.colormap as cm
import folium
import geopandas as gpd
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
from IPython.display import display, HTML

PROJECT_DIR = Path.cwd()
while not (PROJECT_DIR / "src").exists() and PROJECT_DIR != PROJECT_DIR.parent:
    PROJECT_DIR = PROJECT_DIR.parent

if not (PROJECT_DIR / "src").exists():
    raise FileNotFoundError("Could not find project root containing src/ folder.")

sys.path.insert(0, str(PROJECT_DIR))

from src.cb3_utils import load_cb3_tract_universe
from src.map_utils import make_base_map

CLEAN_DIR = PROJECT_DIR / "data" / "clean"
MAP_OUTPUT_DIR = PROJECT_DIR / "maps" / "economic-food"
MAP_OUTPUT_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

ECONOMIC_FOOD_PATH = CLEAN_DIR / "economic-food.csv"
PROVIDER_PATH = CLEAN_DIR / "emergency_food_providers.csv"

BASELINE_CANDIDATES = [
    CLEAN_DIR / "tract_baseline_profile_clean.csv",
    CLEAN_DIR / "tract_baseline_profile_partial_before_crosswalk.csv",
    CLEAN_DIR / "tract_baseline_profile_partial_before_crosswalk_clean.csv",
    CLEAN_DIR / "cb3_tract_baseline_profile.csv",
    CLEAN_DIR / "cb3_tract_baseline_profile_clean.csv",
    CLEAN_DIR / "health_tract.csv",
    CLEAN_DIR / "health.csv",
]
```

```{python}
display(
    HTML(
        """
        <style>
        h1.title, .quarto-title-block { display: none; }
        .leaflet-container { font-family: Arial, sans-serif; }
        .leaflet-tooltip { z-index: 2147483647 !important; }
        .leaflet-control-layers { display: none !important; }
        </style>
        """
    )
)
```

```{python}
MAP_GROUPS = {
    "safety_net": {
        "title": "CB3 Economic Security: Safety-net reliance",
        "subtitle": "Bubbles show DRS Medicaid + SNAP + Cash Assistance context; tract colors show selectable demographic context.",
        "filename": "safety_net_reliance_by_tract.html",
        "bubble_metrics": ["safety_net_enrollment_per_capita", "poverty_rate_pct"],
        "provider_points": False,
    },
    "labor_market": {
        "title": "CB3 Economic Security: Labor market conditions",
        "subtitle": "Bubbles show unemployment, household income, and B20002 median earnings when available; tract colors show selectable demographic context.",
        "filename": "labor_market_conditions_by_tract.html",
        "bubble_metrics": ["unemployment_rate_pct", "median_household_income", "median_earnings_all_workers"],
        "provider_points": False,
    },
    "food_insecurity": {
        "title": "CB3 Economic Security & Food: Food insecurity",
        "subtitle": "Bubbles show PLACES tract food insecurity or food supply gap context; provider points are included when available.",
        "filename": "food_insecurity_and_provider_locations.html",
        "bubble_metrics": ["food_insecurity_rate_pct", "food_supply_gap_score_nta", "food_supply_gap_food_insecure_pct_nta"],
        "provider_points": True,
    },
    "utility_shutoff": {
        "title": "CB3 Economic Security: Utility shutoff risk",
        "subtitle": "Bubbles show PLACES SHUTUTILITY tract estimates; tract colors show selectable demographic context.",
        "filename": "utility_shutoff_risk_by_tract.html",
        "bubble_metrics": ["utility_shutoff_risk_pct"],
        "provider_points": False,
    },
}

BUBBLE_METRICS = {
    "safety_net_enrollment_per_capita": {
        "label": "Safety-net reliance",
        "unit": "rate",
        "count_col": "safety_net_enrollment",
        "denominator_col": "drs_population",
        "count_label": "Combined safety-net enrollment",
        "denominator_label": "ACS poverty universe denominator",
        "geography_note": "DRS counts are CD-level context assigned to CB3 tracts.",
    },
    "poverty_rate_pct": {
        "label": "Poverty rate",
        "unit": "%",
        "count_col": "poverty_count",
        "denominator_col": "poverty_universe_population",
        "count_label": "Population below poverty",
        "denominator_label": "Poverty universe population",
        "geography_note": "ACS B17020 tract-level estimate.",
    },
    "unemployment_rate_pct": {
        "label": "Unemployment rate",
        "unit": "%",
        "count_col": "unemployed_population",
        "denominator_col": "civilian_labor_force",
        "count_label": "Unemployed population",
        "denominator_label": "Civilian labor force",
        "geography_note": "ACS B23025 tract-level estimate.",
    },
    "median_household_income": {
        "label": "Median household income",
        "unit": "$",
        "geography_note": "ACS B19013 tract-level estimate.",
    },
    "median_earnings_all_workers": {
        "label": "Median earnings, all workers",
        "unit": "$",
        "geography_note": "ACS B20002 tract-level estimate.",
    },
    "food_insecurity_rate_pct": {
        "label": "Food insecurity",
        "unit": "%",
        "geography_note": "PLACES FOODINSECU_CrudePrev tract estimate.",
        "extra_tooltip_cols": [
            ("food_supply_gap_rank_nta", "Food supply gap rank, NTA", "rank"),
            ("food_supply_gap_score_nta", "Food supply gap score, NTA", "score"),
            ("food_supply_gap_food_insecure_pct_nta", "Food insecure percentage, NTA", "%"),
        ],
    },
    "food_supply_gap_score_nta": {
        "label": "Food supply gap score",
        "unit": "score",
        "geography_note": "Emergency Food Supply Gap NTA-level context.",
        "extra_tooltip_cols": [
            ("food_supply_gap_rank_nta", "Food supply gap rank, NTA", "rank"),
            ("food_supply_gap_food_insecure_pct_nta", "Food insecure percentage, NTA", "%"),
        ],
    },
    "food_supply_gap_food_insecure_pct_nta": {
        "label": "Food insecure percentage, NTA",
        "unit": "%",
        "geography_note": "Emergency Food Supply Gap NTA-level context.",
        "extra_tooltip_cols": [
            ("food_supply_gap_rank_nta", "Food supply gap rank, NTA", "rank"),
            ("food_supply_gap_score_nta", "Food supply gap score, NTA", "score"),
        ],
    },
    "utility_shutoff_risk_pct": {
        "label": "Utility shutoff risk",
        "unit": "%",
        "geography_note": "PLACES SHUTUTILITY_CrudePrev tract estimate.",
    },
}

# Same demographic background options used by the Health map.
DEMOGRAPHIC_LAYERS = {
    "median_household_income": {"label": "Median household income", "unit": "$"},
    "age_0_to_19_share": {"label": "Age 0-19", "unit": "%"},
    "age_20_to_64_share": {"label": "Age 20-64", "unit": "%"},
    "age_65_plus_share": {"label": "Age 65+", "unit": "%"},
    "white_non_hispanic_share": {"label": "White non-Hispanic share", "unit": "%"},
    "black_non_hispanic_share": {"label": "Black non-Hispanic share", "unit": "%"},
    "asian_non_hispanic_share": {"label": "Asian non-Hispanic share", "unit": "%"},
    "hispanic_share": {"label": "Hispanic share", "unit": "%"},
    "poverty_rate": {"label": "Poverty rate", "unit": "%"},
    "poverty_rate_pct": {"label": "Poverty rate", "unit": "%"},
    "lep_household_share": {"label": "Limited-English-proficient households", "unit": "%"},
}

DEMOGRAPHIC_LAYER_ORDER = [
    "median_household_income",
    "age_0_to_19_share",
    "age_20_to_64_share",
    "age_65_plus_share",
    "white_non_hispanic_share",
    "black_non_hispanic_share",
    "asian_non_hispanic_share",
    "hispanic_share",
    "poverty_rate",
    "poverty_rate_pct",
    "lep_household_share",
]
```

```{python}
def normalize_geoid(series):
    return (
        series.astype(str)
        .str.replace(r"\.0$", "", regex=True)
        .str.extract(r"(\d+)")[0]
        .str.zfill(11)
    )


def add_geoid(df):
    df = df.copy()

    if "GEOID" in df.columns:
        df["GEOID"] = normalize_geoid(df["GEOID"])
        return df

    if "geoid" in df.columns:
        df = df.rename(columns={"geoid": "GEOID"})
        df["GEOID"] = normalize_geoid(df["GEOID"])
        return df

    if "GEOID20" in df.columns:
        df = df.rename(columns={"GEOID20": "GEOID"})
        df["GEOID"] = normalize_geoid(df["GEOID"])
        return df

    if {"state", "county", "tract"}.issubset(df.columns):
        df["GEOID"] = (
            df["state"].astype(str).str.zfill(2)
            + df["county"].astype(str).str.zfill(3)
            + df["tract"].astype(str).str.zfill(6)
        )
        return df

    raise KeyError(f"Could not create GEOID from columns: {list(df.columns)}")


def load_demographic_baseline():
    for path in BASELINE_CANDIDATES:
        if not path.exists():
            continue

        try:
            df = pd.read_csv(path, dtype={"GEOID": "string", "geoid": "string", "GEOID20": "string"}, low_memory=False)
            df = add_geoid(df)
        except Exception as exc:
            print(f"Skipping demographic baseline candidate {path}: {exc}")
            continue

        found = [col for col in DEMOGRAPHIC_LAYER_ORDER if col in df.columns]
        if found:
            print(f"Using demographic baseline: {path}")
            print(f"Demographic columns found: {found}")
            out = df[["GEOID"] + found].copy()
            for col in found:
                out[col] = pd.to_numeric(out[col], errors="coerce")
            return out

    print("No separate demographic baseline file found. Will use demographic columns already present in economic-food.csv where available.")
    return pd.DataFrame(columns=["GEOID"])
```

```{python}
if not ECONOMIC_FOOD_PATH.exists():
    raise FileNotFoundError(f"Could not find clean file: {ECONOMIC_FOOD_PATH}")

economic_food = pd.read_csv(ECONOMIC_FOOD_PATH, dtype={"GEOID": "string"}, low_memory=False)
economic_food = add_geoid(economic_food)

tract_universe, cb3_geometry, _, _ = load_cb3_tract_universe(PROJECT_DIR)
tract_universe["GEOID"] = normalize_geoid(tract_universe["GEOID"])
cb3_geometry["GEOID"] = normalize_geoid(cb3_geometry["GEOID"])

tracts = cb3_geometry.merge(
    tract_universe.drop(columns="geometry", errors="ignore"),
    on="GEOID",
    how="left",
    validate="one_to_one",
)

economic_cols = [col for col in economic_food.columns if col == "GEOID" or col not in tracts.columns]
tracts = tracts.merge(economic_food[economic_cols], on="GEOID", how="left", validate="one_to_one")

demographic_baseline = load_demographic_baseline()
if not demographic_baseline.empty:
    # Overwrite/fill demographic columns with restored baseline columns.
    for col in [c for c in demographic_baseline.columns if c != "GEOID"]:
        if col in tracts.columns:
            tracts = tracts.drop(columns=[col])
    tracts = tracts.merge(demographic_baseline, on="GEOID", how="left", validate="one_to_one")

tracts = tracts.to_crs("EPSG:4326")

if "tract_label" not in tracts.columns:
    tracts["tract_label"] = tracts["GEOID"].str[-6:].str.lstrip("0")

if "nta_name" not in tracts.columns:
    if "nta_name_x" in tracts.columns:
        tracts["nta_name"] = tracts["nta_name_x"]
    elif "NTAName" in tracts.columns:
        tracts["nta_name"] = tracts["NTAName"]
    else:
        tracts["nta_name"] = ""

numeric_candidates = set(DEMOGRAPHIC_LAYER_ORDER)
for metric, meta in BUBBLE_METRICS.items():
    numeric_candidates.add(metric)
    for col in [meta.get("count_col"), meta.get("denominator_col")]:
        if col:
            numeric_candidates.add(col)
    for col, _, _ in meta.get("extra_tooltip_cols", []):
        numeric_candidates.add(col)

for col in numeric_candidates:
    if col in tracts.columns:
        tracts[col] = pd.to_numeric(tracts[col], errors="coerce")

AVAILABLE_DEMOGRAPHIC_LAYERS = []
seen_labels = set()
for metric in DEMOGRAPHIC_LAYER_ORDER:
    if metric in tracts.columns and tracts[metric].notna().any():
        label = DEMOGRAPHIC_LAYERS[metric]["label"]
        if label not in seen_labels:
            AVAILABLE_DEMOGRAPHIC_LAYERS.append(metric)
            seen_labels.add(label)

AVAILABLE_MAP_GROUPS = {}
for group_key, group_spec in MAP_GROUPS.items():
    available_bubbles = [
        metric for metric in group_spec["bubble_metrics"]
        if metric in tracts.columns and tracts[metric].notna().any()
    ]
    if available_bubbles:
        AVAILABLE_MAP_GROUPS[group_key] = {**group_spec, "available_bubbles": available_bubbles}

assert len(tracts) == 31, f"Expected 31 CB3 tracts, got {len(tracts)}"
assert tracts["GEOID"].is_unique, "GEOID is not unique."

print("Available maps:")
for group_key, spec in AVAILABLE_MAP_GROUPS.items():
    print(f"  {spec['filename']}: {spec['available_bubbles']}")

print("Available demographic backgrounds:")
if AVAILABLE_DEMOGRAPHIC_LAYERS:
    for metric in AVAILABLE_DEMOGRAPHIC_LAYERS:
        print(f"  {DEMOGRAPHIC_LAYERS[metric]['label']} ({metric}): {tracts[metric].notna().sum()} tracts")
else:
    print("  none")
```

```{python}
if PROVIDER_PATH.exists():
    providers = pd.read_csv(PROVIDER_PATH, low_memory=False)
    providers["latitude"] = pd.to_numeric(providers["latitude"], errors="coerce")
    providers["longitude"] = pd.to_numeric(providers["longitude"], errors="coerce")
    providers = providers.dropna(subset=["latitude", "longitude"]).copy()
else:
    providers = pd.DataFrame(columns=["provider_name", "address", "provider_type", "latitude", "longitude"])

print(f"Emergency food provider points: {len(providers)}")
```

```{python}
BACKGROUND_PALETTE = ["#f7fcf5", "#e5f5e0", "#c7e9c0", "#a1d99b", "#74c476", "#31a354", "#006d2c"]
BUBBLE_COLORS = {
    "safety_net_enrollment_per_capita": "#222222",
    "poverty_rate_pct": "#555555",
    "unemployment_rate_pct": "#222222",
    "median_household_income": "#555555",
    "median_earnings_all_workers": "#777777",
    "food_insecurity_rate_pct": "#222222",
    "food_supply_gap_score_nta": "#555555",
    "food_supply_gap_food_insecure_pct_nta": "#777777",
    "utility_shutoff_risk_pct": "#222222",
}
PROVIDER_COLOR = "#7a0177"


def format_value(value, unit):
    if pd.isna(value):
        return "Not available"
    if unit == "%":
        return f"{value:.1f}%"
    if unit == "$":
        return f"${value:,.0f}"
    if unit == "rank":
        return f"{value:,.0f}"
    if unit == "score":
        return f"{value:.2f}"
    if unit == "rate":
        return f"{value:.2f}"
    if unit == "count":
        return f"{value:,.0f}"
    return f"{value:,.1f}"


def make_breaks(values, bins=5):
    valid = pd.Series(values).dropna()
    valid = valid[valid >= 0]
    if valid.empty:
        return [0, 1]
    if valid.nunique() <= bins:
        breaks = sorted(valid.unique())
    else:
        breaks = list(valid.quantile(np.linspace(0, 1, bins + 1)).values)
    breaks = sorted(set(float(x) for x in breaks if pd.notna(x)))
    if len(breaks) == 1:
        breaks = [0.0, breaks[0]] if breaks[0] > 0 else [0.0, 1.0]
    cleaned = [breaks[0]]
    for value in breaks[1:]:
        if value <= cleaned[-1]:
            value = cleaned[-1] + 1e-9
        cleaned.append(value)
    return cleaned


def add_title(map_object, title, subtitle):
    title_html = f"""
    <div class="cb3-map-title">
      <div class="cb3-map-title-main">{html.escape(title)}</div>
      <div class="cb3-map-title-sub">{html.escape(subtitle)}</div>
    </div>
    """
    css = """
    <style>
      .cb3-map-title {
        position: fixed !important;
        top: 12px !important;
        left: 120px !important;
        z-index: 2147483646 !important;
        background: rgba(255,255,255,0.92) !important;
        border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.20) !important;
        border-radius: 4px !important;
        padding: 10px 14px !important;
        max-width: 760px !important;
        font-family: Arial, sans-serif !important;
        box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.18) !important;
      }
      .cb3-map-title-main {
        font-size: 24px !important;
        line-height: 1.15 !important;
        font-weight: 700 !important;
        color: #222 !important;
      }
      .cb3-map-title-sub {
        margin-top: 6px !important;
        font-size: 17px !important;
        line-height: 1.25 !important;
        color: #222 !important;
      }
    </style>
    """
    map_object.get_root().html.add_child(folium.Element(css + title_html))
```

```{python}
def add_demographic_layer(map_object, geodata, metric):
    label = DEMOGRAPHIC_LAYERS[metric]["label"]
    unit = DEMOGRAPHIC_LAYERS[metric]["unit"]
    plot_data = geodata.copy()
    plot_data[f"{metric}_display"] = plot_data[metric].apply(lambda x: format_value(x, unit))

    breaks = make_breaks(plot_data[metric], bins=5)
    colors = BACKGROUND_PALETTE[: max(2, len(breaks) - 1)]
    color_map = cm.StepColormap(colors=colors, index=breaks, vmin=breaks[0], vmax=breaks[-1])

    def style_function(feature):
        value = feature["properties"].get(metric)
        fill_color = "#f7f7f7" if value is None or pd.isna(value) else color_map(value)
        return {"fillColor": fill_color, "color": "#555555", "weight": 1.1, "fillOpacity": 0.72}

    tooltip = folium.GeoJsonTooltip(
        fields=["tract_label", "nta_name", f"{metric}_display"],
        aliases=["Census tract", "NTA", label],
        sticky=True,
        labels=True,
        style="""
            background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.92);
            border: 1px solid #cccccc;
            border-radius: 4px;
            box-shadow: 2px 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            font-size: 15px;
            padding: 8px;
        """,
    )

    group = folium.FeatureGroup(name=label, show=False, control=False)
    folium.GeoJson(plot_data, style_function=style_function, tooltip=tooltip).add_to(group)
    group.add_to(map_object)
    return {"label": label, "js_name": group.get_name(), "metric": metric}


def add_no_background_layer(map_object, geodata):
    group = folium.FeatureGroup(name="No demographic background", show=False, control=False)
    folium.GeoJson(
        geodata,
        interactive=False,
        style_function=lambda feature: {"fillColor": "#ffffff", "color": "#555555", "weight": 1.1, "fillOpacity": 0.0},
    ).add_to(group)
    group.add_to(map_object)
    return {"label": "No demographic background", "js_name": group.get_name(), "metric": "__none__"}


def add_outline_layer(map_object, geodata):
    group = folium.FeatureGroup(name="CB3 census tract outlines", show=True, control=False)
    folium.GeoJson(
        geodata,
        interactive=False,
        style_function=lambda feature: {"fillColor": "transparent", "color": "#222222", "weight": 1.6, "fillOpacity": 0},
    ).add_to(group)
    group.add_to(map_object)
    return {"label": "CB3 census tract outlines", "js_name": group.get_name()}


def add_metric_bubbles(map_object, geodata, metric, show=True):
    meta = BUBBLE_METRICS[metric]
    label = meta["label"]
    unit = meta["unit"]
    count_col = meta.get("count_col")
    denominator_col = meta.get("denominator_col")

    plot_data = geodata.copy()
    plot_data[f"{metric}_display"] = plot_data[metric].apply(lambda x: format_value(x, unit))

    if count_col and count_col in plot_data.columns:
        size_series = plot_data[count_col].fillna(0)
    else:
        size_series = plot_data[metric].fillna(0)

    max_size = max(float(size_series.max(skipna=True)), 1.0)

    projected = plot_data.to_crs("EPSG:2263")
    points = projected.copy()
    points["geometry"] = points.geometry.representative_point()
    points = points.to_crs("EPSG:4326")

    color = BUBBLE_COLORS.get(metric, "#222222")
    group = folium.FeatureGroup(name=f"{label} bubbles", show=show, control=False)

    for _, row in points.iterrows():
        value = row.get(metric)
        if pd.isna(value):
            continue

        if count_col and count_col in points.columns and pd.notna(row.get(count_col)):
            size_value = row.get(count_col)
        else:
            size_value = value

        radius = 5 + 22 * np.sqrt(max(float(size_value), 0) / max_size)

        tooltip_rows = [
            ("Census tract", row.get("tract_label", row.get("GEOID", ""))),
            ("NTA", row.get("nta_name", "")),
            (label, row.get(f"{metric}_display", format_value(value, unit))),
        ]

        if count_col and count_col in row and pd.notna(row.get(count_col)):
            tooltip_rows.append((meta.get("count_label", "Count"), format_value(row.get(count_col), "count")))

        if denominator_col and denominator_col in row and pd.notna(row.get(denominator_col)):
            tooltip_rows.append((meta.get("denominator_label", "Denominator"), format_value(row.get(denominator_col), "count")))

        for extra_col, extra_label, extra_unit in meta.get("extra_tooltip_cols", []):
            if extra_col in row and pd.notna(row.get(extra_col)):
                tooltip_rows.append((extra_label, format_value(row.get(extra_col), extra_unit)))

        if meta.get("geography_note"):
            tooltip_rows.append(("Geography", meta["geography_note"]))

        tooltip_html = "<table>" + "".join(
            f"<tr><td style='font-weight:700; padding:3px 12px 3px 0;'>{html.escape(str(k))}</td>"
            f"<td style='padding:3px 0;'>{html.escape(str(v))}</td></tr>"
            for k, v in tooltip_rows
        ) + "</table>"

        folium.CircleMarker(
            location=[row.geometry.y, row.geometry.x],
            radius=radius,
            color=color,
            weight=1.5,
            fill=True,
            fill_color=color,
            fill_opacity=0.42,
            opacity=0.70,
            tooltip=folium.Tooltip(tooltip_html, sticky=True),
            popup=folium.Popup(tooltip_html, max_width=420),
        ).add_to(group)

    group.add_to(map_object)
    return {"label": f"{label} bubbles", "js_name": group.get_name(), "metric": metric, "show": show}


def add_provider_points(map_object, provider_frame, show=False):
    group = folium.FeatureGroup(name=f"Emergency food providers (n={len(provider_frame)})", show=show, control=False)
    for _, row in provider_frame.iterrows():
        name = row.get("provider_name", "Emergency food provider")
        lines = [f"<b>{html.escape(str(name))}</b>"]
        if pd.notna(row.get("provider_type")):
            lines.append(f"Type: {html.escape(str(row.get('provider_type')))}")
        if pd.notna(row.get("address")):
            lines.append(f"Address: {html.escape(str(row.get('address')))}")
        folium.CircleMarker(
            location=[row["latitude"], row["longitude"]],
            radius=5,
            color=PROVIDER_COLOR,
            fill=True,
            fill_color=PROVIDER_COLOR,
            fill_opacity=0.85,
            tooltip=folium.Tooltip("<br>".join(lines), sticky=True),
        ).add_to(group)
    group.add_to(map_object)
    return {"label": f"Emergency food providers (n={len(provider_frame)})", "js_name": group.get_name(), "show": show}
```

```{python}
def add_custom_side_panel(map_object, demographic_layers, bubble_layers, outline_layer, provider_layer=None):
    map_name = map_object.get_name()

    default_idx = 0
    for i, layer in enumerate(demographic_layers):
        if layer["metric"] == "median_household_income":
            default_idx = i

    demo_controls = []
    for i, layer in enumerate(demographic_layers):
        checked = "checked" if i == default_idx else ""
        demo_controls.append(
            f"""
            <label class="cb3-panel-option">
              <input type="radio" name="cb3-demographic-background-{map_name}" value="{i}" {checked}>
              {html.escape(layer["label"])}
            </label>
            """
        )

    bubble_controls = []
    for i, layer in enumerate(bubble_layers):
        checked = "checked" if layer.get("show") else ""
        bubble_controls.append(
            f"""
            <label class="cb3-panel-option">
              <input type="checkbox" class="cb3-bubble-toggle-{map_name}" value="{i}" {checked}>
              {html.escape(layer["label"])}
            </label>
            """
        )

    provider_control = ""
    if provider_layer is not None:
        checked = "checked" if provider_layer.get("show") else ""
        provider_control = f"""
        <label class="cb3-panel-option">
          <input type="checkbox" id="cb3-provider-toggle-{map_name}" {checked}>
          {html.escape(provider_layer["label"])}
        </label>
        """

    panel_html = f"""
    <div id="cb3-health-style-panel-{map_name}" class="cb3-health-style-panel">
      <div class="cb3-panel-section">
        {''.join(demo_controls)}
      </div>
      <div class="cb3-panel-divider"></div>
      <div class="cb3-panel-section">
        <label class="cb3-panel-option">
          <input type="checkbox" id="cb3-outline-toggle-{map_name}" checked>
          {html.escape(outline_layer["label"])}
        </label>
        {provider_control}
        {''.join(bubble_controls)}
      </div>
    </div>
    """

    css = f"""
    <style>
      #cb3-health-style-panel-{map_name} {{
        position: fixed !important;
        top: 12px !important;
        right: 12px !important;
        z-index: 2147483647 !important;
        background: rgba(255,255,255,0.96) !important;
        border: 2px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.25) !important;
        border-radius: 4px !important;
        padding: 8px 10px !important;
        min-width: 345px !important;
        max-width: 430px !important;
        max-height: 88vh !important;
        overflow-y: auto !important;
        font-family: Arial, sans-serif !important;
        font-size: 17px !important;
        line-height: 1.28 !important;
        box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.25) !important;
      }}
      #cb3-health-style-panel-{map_name} .cb3-panel-option {{
        display: block !important;
        margin: 6px 0 !important;
        color: #222 !important;
        white-space: normal !important;
      }}
      #cb3-health-style-panel-{map_name} input {{
        margin-right: 6px !important;
        transform: scale(1.18);
        vertical-align: middle !important;
      }}
      #cb3-health-style-panel-{map_name} .cb3-panel-divider {{
        border-top: 1px solid #d0d0d0 !important;
        margin: 9px 0 !important;
      }}
    </style>
    """

    demo_js = ",\n".join([f'{{label: {json.dumps(layer["label"])}, layer: {layer["js_name"]}}}' for layer in demographic_layers])
    bubble_js = ",\n".join([f'{{label: {json.dumps(layer["label"])}, layer: {layer["js_name"]}}}' for layer in bubble_layers])
    provider_js = provider_layer["js_name"] if provider_layer is not None else "null"

    js = f"""
    <script>
    (function() {{
      function setupPanel() {{
        var map = {map_name};
        var demoLayers = [{demo_js}];
        var bubbleLayers = [{bubble_js}];
        var outlineLayer = {outline_layer["js_name"]};
        var providerLayer = {provider_js};

        function setDemographicLayer(index) {{
          demoLayers.forEach(function(item) {{
            if (map.hasLayer(item.layer)) {{
              map.removeLayer(item.layer);
            }}
          }});
          if (demoLayers[index]) {{
            demoLayers[index].layer.addTo(map);
          }}
        }}

        function setBubbleLayer(index, visible) {{
          if (!bubbleLayers[index]) return;
          var layer = bubbleLayers[index].layer;
          if (visible) {{
            if (!map.hasLayer(layer)) layer.addTo(map);
          }} else {{
            if (map.hasLayer(layer)) map.removeLayer(layer);
          }}
        }}

        document.querySelectorAll('input[name="cb3-demographic-background-{map_name}"]').forEach(function(input) {{
          input.addEventListener('change', function(event) {{
            setDemographicLayer(parseInt(event.target.value));
          }});
        }});

        document.querySelectorAll('.cb3-bubble-toggle-{map_name}').forEach(function(input) {{
          input.addEventListener('change', function(event) {{
            setBubbleLayer(parseInt(event.target.value), event.target.checked);
          }});
        }});

        var outlineToggle = document.getElementById('cb3-outline-toggle-{map_name}');
        if (outlineToggle) {{
          outlineToggle.addEventListener('change', function(event) {{
            if (event.target.checked) {{
              if (!map.hasLayer(outlineLayer)) outlineLayer.addTo(map);
            }} else {{
              if (map.hasLayer(outlineLayer)) map.removeLayer(outlineLayer);
            }}
          }});
        }}

        var providerToggle = document.getElementById('cb3-provider-toggle-{map_name}');
        if (providerToggle && providerLayer) {{
          providerToggle.addEventListener('change', function(event) {{
            if (event.target.checked) {{
              if (!map.hasLayer(providerLayer)) providerLayer.addTo(map);
            }} else {{
              if (map.hasLayer(providerLayer)) map.removeLayer(providerLayer);
            }}
          }});
        }}

        var checkedDemo = document.querySelector('input[name="cb3-demographic-background-{map_name}"]:checked');
        if (checkedDemo) {{
          setDemographicLayer(parseInt(checkedDemo.value));
        }}
      }}

      if (document.readyState === 'loading') {{
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', setupPanel);
      }} else {{
        setupPanel();
      }}
    }})();
    </script>
    """

    map_object.get_root().html.add_child(folium.Element(css + panel_html + js))
```

```{python}
def build_group_map(group_key, group_spec):
    m = make_base_map(tracts)

    demographic_layer_objects = []
    for demo_metric in AVAILABLE_DEMOGRAPHIC_LAYERS:
        demographic_layer_objects.append(add_demographic_layer(m, tracts, demo_metric))

    demographic_layer_objects.append(add_no_background_layer(m, tracts))

    outline_layer = add_outline_layer(m, tracts)

    bubble_layer_objects = []
    for i, metric in enumerate(group_spec["available_bubbles"]):
        bubble_layer_objects.append(add_metric_bubbles(m, tracts, metric, show=(i == 0)))

    provider_layer = None
    if group_spec.get("provider_points") and not providers.empty:
        provider_layer = add_provider_points(m, providers, show=False)

    add_title(m, group_spec["title"], group_spec["subtitle"])
    add_custom_side_panel(m, demographic_layer_objects, bubble_layer_objects, outline_layer, provider_layer=provider_layer)

    return m


rendered_maps = {}

for group_key, group_spec in AVAILABLE_MAP_GROUPS.items():
    output_path = MAP_OUTPUT_DIR / group_spec["filename"]
    m = build_group_map(group_key, group_spec)
    m.save(output_path)
    rendered_maps[group_key] = m
    print(f"Saved {group_key}: {output_path}")
```

## Preview all available maps

```{python}
if rendered_maps:
    for group_key, map_object in rendered_maps.items():
        display(HTML(f"<h3>{AVAILABLE_MAP_GROUPS[group_key]['title']}</h3>"))
        display(map_object)
else:
    display(
        HTML(
            """
            <div style="padding: 12px; border: 1px solid #cc0000; background: #fff5f5;">
              <b>No Economic/Food metric-group maps were rendered.</b>
            </div>
            """
        )
    )
```

## Validation summary

```{python}
map_summary = pd.DataFrame(
    [
        {
            "metric_group": group_key,
            "map_title": group_spec["title"],
            "html_file": group_spec["filename"],
            "bubble_metrics_included": ", ".join(group_spec["available_bubbles"]),
        }
        for group_key, group_spec in AVAILABLE_MAP_GROUPS.items()
    ]
)
display(map_summary)

missing_summary = pd.DataFrame(
    [
        {
            "metric_group": group_key,
            "expected_html_file": group_spec["filename"],
            "target_metrics": ", ".join(group_spec["bubble_metrics"]),
            "status": "missing because all target fields are absent or null",
        }
        for group_key, group_spec in MAP_GROUPS.items()
        if group_key not in AVAILABLE_MAP_GROUPS
    ]
)
display(missing_summary)

demographic_summary = pd.DataFrame(
    [
        {
            "demographic_layer": metric,
            "label": DEMOGRAPHIC_LAYERS[metric]["label"],
            "tracts_with_data": int(tracts[metric].notna().sum()),
            "min": tracts[metric].min(skipna=True),
            "max": tracts[metric].max(skipna=True),
        }
        for metric in AVAILABLE_DEMOGRAPHIC_LAYERS
    ]
)
display(demographic_summary)

expected_files = [MAP_OUTPUT_DIR / spec["filename"] for spec in AVAILABLE_MAP_GROUPS.values()]
for path in expected_files:
    assert path.exists(), path
    assert path.stat().st_size > 10_000, path

print(f"Wrote {len(expected_files)} metric-group HTML files to {MAP_OUTPUT_DIR}")
for path in expected_files:
    print(f"  {path.relative_to(PROJECT_DIR)}")
```
